description: Hand-rolled WebSocket echo on tokio-uring — the io_uring-backed Rust runtime with a completion/owned-buffer API. One tokio-uring runtime per core with SO_REUSEPORT, and a from-scratch RFC 6455 handshake (hand-written SHA-1 + base64) and frame parser/masking on tokio-uring's TcpStream. No WebSocket library.
